theme: 24. f-string 格式化（数字/字符串），**复习字符串方法**
user_prompt: 我现在要生成的单元主题是：24. f-string 格式化（数字/字符串），**复习字符串方法**
raw_text:
[
  {
    "id": 1,
    "type": "choice",
    "title": "点餐新招",
    "content": "阿强写了个小程序来点餐，他想用 f-string 把商品`item`（炸鸡）和价格`price`（25.5）漂亮地输出为“炸鸡 25.5元”。哪一行代码是正确的？",
    "options": [
      "print(f\"item price元\")",
      "print(f\"{item} {price}元\")",
      "print(f\"{‘item’} {‘price’}元\")",
      "print(\"f {item} {price}元\")"
    ],
    "answer": "B",
    "hints": [
      "f-string里大括号里要放变量名，不是字符串。",
      "正确格式是以 f 或 F 开头，字符串内变量用{}包裹。",
      "选项A没放变量，C在{}里加了引号，D的f没在引号前。"
    ],
    "explanation": "f-string 以 f 或 F 开头，字符串内用花括号 {} 直接包裹变量名或表达式，运行时会被其值替换。选项B的语法完全正确。",
    "example": "name = ‘小明’; print(f\"你好，{name}!\")  # 输出：你好，小明！"
  },
  {
    "id": 2,
    "type": "choice",
    "title": "成绩单美化师",
    "content": "编程课上，老师要求将平均分`avg_score`（87.654321）格式化为保留两位小数输出。哪个 f-string 表达式能满足要求？",
    "options": [
      "f\"{avg_score:.2}\"",
      "f\"{avg_score:2f}\"",
      "f\"{avg_score:.2f}\"",
      "f\"{avg_score:2}\""
    ],
    "answer": "C",
    "hints": [
      "想想格式化数字小数位的格式说明符。",
      "保留两位小数通常用‘.2f’来表示。",
      "冒号`:`后接格式说明符，`.2f`表示小数点后两位。"
    ],
    "explanation": "在 f-string 中，`:` 后可以添加格式说明符。`.2f` 表示将数字格式化为浮点数，并保留两位小数。这是最常见的数字格式化方式之一。",
    "example": "pi = 3.14159; print(f\"{pi:.1f}\")  # 输出：3.1"
  },
  {
    "id": 3,
    "type": "choice",
    "title": "购物小票",
    "content": "你想用 f-string 直接计算并打印“3件商品，单价8元，总价：”的结果。哪个表达式不能正常工作？",
    "options": [
      "f\"总价：{3 * 8}\"",
      "f\"总价：{‘3 * 8’}\"",
      "f\"总价：{3 * 8}元\"",
      "f\"总价：{24}\""
    ],
    "answer": "B",
    "hints": [
      "f-string的{}里可以放表达式，但不能放带引号的字符串。",
      "计算机会直接计算{}内的表达式。",
      "选项B的{}内是字符串‘3 * 8’，所以输出的是这串字符，而非计算结果24。"
    ],
    "explanation": "f-string 的花括号 `{}` 内可以放置任何有效的Python表达式，系统会计算该表达式并用结果替换。但若用引号包裹，则被视为字符串字面量，不会进行计算。选项B即为此错误。",
    "example": "print(f\"两数之和：{5 + 3}\")  # 输出：两数之和：8"
  },
  {
    "id": 4,
    "type": "fill",
    "title": "体温报告",
    "content": "帮医生完善他的诊断报告生成器，将病人姓名和体温（一位小数）填入报告模板。",
    "input": null,
    "output": ["病人：张三，当前体温：37.2°C。"],
    "code_segments": {
      "segments": [
        {
          "type": "code_block",
          "lines": [
            {"type": "code_line", "value": "name = \"张三\""},
            {"type": "code_line", "value": "temperature = 37.155"},
            {"type": "code_line", "value": "report = f\"病人：{name}，当前体温：{___}°C。\""},
            {"type": "code_line", "value": "print(report)"}
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    "options": ["temperature", "temperature:.1f", "temperature:.0f", "name", "\"temperature\"", "temperature:.2f"],
    "answer": [1],
    "explanation": "题目要求体温保留一位小数，因此需要在变量`temperature`后使用格式说明符 `:.1f` 来控制输出格式，得到37.2°C。",
    "example": "num = 5.666; print(f\"{num:.2f}\")  # 输出：5.67"
  },
  {
    "id": 5,
    "type": "fill",
    "title": "简易计算器",
    "content": "小明的计算器代码被墨水弄花了几个关键部分，请帮他恢复，使其能正确输出格式化的计算结果。",
    "input": null,
    "output": ["10 + 20 = 30", "10 / 3 ≈ 3.33"],
    "code_segments": {
      "segments": [
        {
          "type": "code_block",
          "lines": [
            {"type": "code_line", "value": "a = 10"},
            {"type": "code_line", "value": "b = 20"},
            {"type": "code_line", "value": "print(____)"},
            {"type": "code_line", "value": "b = 3"},
            {"type": "code_line", "value": "print(f\"{a} / {b} ≈ {____}\")"}
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    "options": ["f\"{a} + {b} = {a+b}\"", "\"{a} + {b} = {a+b}\"", "a + b = a+b", "a / b", "a/b:.2f", "a/b", "a/b:.1f", "f\"{a}+{b}={a+b}\""],
    "answer": [0, 4],
    "explanation": "第一处需要f-string来输出完整的算式和结果，选项0正确。第二处是除法计算并要求保留两位小数，`a/b:.2f` 满足要求。",
    "example": "x,y=7,2; print(f\"{x}*{y}={x*y}, {x/y:.3f}\")  # 输出：7*2=14, 3.500"
  },
  {
    "id": 6,
    "type": "choice",
    "title": "单词切割机",
    "content": "你拿到一句英文“I love Python!”，想把它按空格拆成单词列表。应该用哪个字符串方法？",
    "options": [
      ".join()",
      ".split()",
      ".strip()",
      ".replace()"
    ],
    "answer": "B",
    "hints": [
      "想想“拆分”这个动作对应的英文单词。",
      "这个方法默认以空白字符（空格、换行等）为分隔符。",
      ".split() 用于将字符串分割成子串并返回列表。"
    ],
    "explanation": "`split()` 方法通过指定分隔符（默认是任意空白字符）对字符串进行分割，返回一个由分割后的子串组成的列表。这正是将句子拆分成单词所需的功能。",
    "example": "\"a,b,c\".split(',') 得到列表 ['a', 'b', 'c']。"
  },
  {
    "id": 7,
    "type": "choice",
    "title": "列表粘合剂",
    "content": "你有一个列表`fruits = [‘苹果’， ‘香蕉’， ‘橙子’]`，想用‘和’字把它们连接成“苹果和香蕉和橙子”。哪个方法最合适？",
    "options": [
      "fruits.join(‘和’)",
      "‘和’.join(fruits)",
      "fruits.split(‘和’)",
      "fruits.connect(‘和’)"
    ],
    "answer": "B",
    "hints": [
      "注意！`join`方法是字符串的方法，不是列表的方法。",
      "语法是：连接符.join(待连接的字符串列表)。",
      "字符串‘和’调用`.join()`，参数是列表`fruits`。"
    ],
    "explanation": "`join()` 是字符串（str）的一个方法，它接收一个可迭代对象（如列表），并用该字符串作为连接符，将其中的所有元素（必须是字符串）连接成一个新的字符串。",
    "example": "\"-\".join([‘2023’, ‘05’, ‘01’]) 返回 ‘2023-05-01’。"
  },
  {
    "id": 8,
    "type": "choice",
    "title": "数据清理工",
    "content": "从文件读入的用户名`user_input = \" admin \\n\"` 两边有空格和换行符。哪个操作能最干净地得到‘admin’？",
    "options": [
      "user_input.split()",
      "user_input.strip()",
      "user_input.replace(\" \", \"\")",
      "user_input.trim()"
    ],
    "answer": "B",
    "hints": [
      "目标是去掉字符串“两端”的空白字符。",
      "Python中去除两端空白的方法是`.strip()`。",
      "`.replace()`只能替换指定字符，不能处理所有空白；`.split()`会分割；Python没有`.trim()`。"
    ],
    "explanation": "`strip()` 方法用于移除字符串**开头和末尾**的指定字符（默认为所有空白字符，包括空格、换行`\\n`、制表符`\\t`等），非常适合清理用户输入。",
    "example": "text = \"  hello\\t\"; print(text.strip())  # 输出：‘hello’"
  },
  {
    "id": 9,
    "type": "fill",
    "title": "用户名格式化",
    "content": "下面代码用于处理用户输入的邮箱，提取用户名并确保其小写且首字母大写。请补全缺失的部分。",
    "input": ["alICE@example.com"],
    "output": ["Formatted Username: Alice"],
    "code_segments": {
      "segments": [
        {
          "type": "code_block",
          "lines": [
            {"type": "code_line", "value": "email = input()"},

            {"type": "code_line", "value": "username = email.____('@')[0]"},
            {"type": "code_line", "value": "# 先全部转为小写，再将首字母大写"},
            {"type": "code_line", "value": "formatted_name = username.____().____()"},
            {"type": "code_line", "value": "print(f\"Formatted Username: {formatted_name}\")"}
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    "options": ["split", "lower", "title", "upper", "capitalize", "find", "replace", "strip"],
    "answer": [0, 1, 4],
    "explanation": "首先用`.split('@')`分割邮箱，取第一部分得到‘alICE’。然后用`.lower()`转为全小写‘alice’。最后用`.capitalize()`将首字母大写得到‘Alice’。`.title()`会将每个单词首字母大写，此处不适用。",
    "example": "\"heLLO wORLD\".lower().capitalize()  # 得到 ‘Hello world’"
  },
  {
    "id": 10,
    "type": "fill",
    "title": "密文生成器",
    "content": "这段“机密”代码要将一句话中的空格替换为下划线，并倒序输出。请填入正确的字符串方法。",
    "input": null,
    "output": ["_siht_ekil_si_ti_oS"],
    "code_segments": {
      "segments": [
        {
          "type": "code_block",
          "lines": [
            {"type": "code_line", "value": "text = \"So it is like this\""},
            {"type": "code_line", "value": "# 替换空格为下划线"},
            {"type": "code_line", "value": "step1 = text.____(\" \", \"_\")"},
            {"type": "code_line", "value": "# 将字符串反转"},
            {"type": "code_line", "value": "secret = step1[____]"},
            {"type": "code_line", "value": "print(secret)"}
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    "options": ["replace", "split", "::-1", "-1::", "swapcase", "join", "strip", ":0:-1"],
    "answer": [0, 2],
    "explanation": "第一步，使用`.replace(\" \", \"_\")`将空格替换为下划线，得到‘So_it_is_like_this’。第二步，使用切片`[::-1]`可以反转整个字符串。",
    "example": "\"abc\".replace('b', 'x')[::-1]  # 结果为 ‘xca’"
  },
  {
    "id": 11,
    "type": "choice",
    "title": "对齐的菜单",
    "content": "为了让菜单看起来整齐，你需要将菜名`dish`（‘鱼香肉丝’）在10个字符宽度内左对齐，价格`price`（28）在6个字符宽度内右对齐。哪个f-string能做到？",
    "options": [
      "f\"{dish:10} {price:>6}\"",
      "f\"{dish:<10} {price:6}\"",
      "f\"{dish:<10} {price:>6}\"",
      "f\"{dish:>10} {price:<6}\""
    ],
    "answer": "C",
    "hints": [
      "`<`表示左对齐，`>`表示右对齐。",
      "数字表示字段的总宽度，对齐符号放在冒号和宽度数字之间。",
      "菜名要左对齐用`<10`，价格要右对齐用`>6`。"
    ],
    "explanation": "在f-string的格式说明符中，`<` 表示左对齐，`>` 表示右对齐，其后接的数字表示该字段占用的最小总宽度。因此 `{dish:<10}` 和 `{price:>6}` 符合题目要求。",
    "example": "print(f\"{‘Hi’:>5}{3:<4}\")  # 输出：‘   Hi3   ’ (Hi右对齐占5格，3左对齐占4格)"
  },
  {
    "id": 12,
    "type": "choice",
    "title": "格式说明符大比拼",
    "content": "对于整数`num = 42`，哪个f-string格式化表达式输出的结果**不是**‘00042’？",
    "options": [
      "f\"{num:05d}\"",
      "f\"{num:0>5}\"",
      "f\"{num:>5}\"",
      "f\"{num:0>5d}\""
    ],
    "answer": "C",
    "hints": [
      "目标是输出5位，不足位用0补齐。",
      "注意`>`是右对齐，但如果不指定填充字符，默认用空格。",
      "选项C只指定了右对齐宽度5，没用0填充，所以会用空格补位。"
    ],
    "explanation": "`{num:>5}` 表示右对齐，宽度为5，但未指定填充字符，因此默认用空格填充左侧，结果是‘   42’。其他选项都明确用‘0’作为填充字符，并满足宽度5的要求，故输出‘00042’。",
    "example": "n=7; print(f\"{n:*>3}\")  # 输出：‘**7’；print(f\"{n:3}\")  # 输出：‘  7’"
  },
  {
    "id": 13,
    "type": "choice",
    "title": "嵌套的乐趣",
    "content": "变量`a=1, b=2`，你想用f-string计算并输出“(1+2)=3”。哪项写法是**错误**的？",
    "options": [
      "f\"({a}+{b})={a+b}\"",
      "f\"({a}+{b})={f'{a+b}'}\"",
      "f\"({a}+{b})={{a+b}}\"",
      "f\"({a}+{b})={‘{a+b}’}\""
    ],
    "answer": "D",
    "hints": [
      "f-string内的大括号需要转义才能输出原字符。",
      "选项C用了双重`{{`和`}}`来输出单层大括号。",
      "选项B是合法的嵌套f-string，但D在{}内放了带引号的字符串，不会计算。"
    ],
    "explanation": "在f-string中，`{}` 用于求值表达式。要输出花括号本身，需使用双写 `{{` 或 `}}` 进行转义。选项D在 `{}` 内放置了字符串字面量 `‘{a+b}’`，因此直接输出该字符串，而非计算结果。",
    "example": "print(f\"{{{1+2}}}\")  # 输出：{3}；print(f\"{‘{1+2}’}\")  # 输出：{1+2}"
  },
  {
    "id": 14,
    "type": "fill",
    "title": "财务简报",
    "content": "请补全代码，生成一份格式清晰的财务简报，要求收入千分位分隔，利润率显示为百分比。",

    "output": ["收入： 1,234,567 ¥", "利润率： 12.35%"],
    "code_segments": {
      "segments": [
        {
          "type": "code_block",
          "lines": [
            {"type": "code_line", "value": "revenue = 1234567"},
            {"type": "code_line", "value": "profit_ratio = 0.12345"},
            {"type": "code_line", "value": "print(f\"收入： {revenue:____} ¥\")"},
            {"type": "code_line", "value": "print(f\"利润率： {profit_ratio:____}\")"}
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    "options": [">10d", ",", ":.2%", ":.1f", ":,.0f", ":d", ":>10,.0f", ":.0%"],
    "answer": [6, 2],
    "explanation": "收入`revenue`需要千分位逗号分隔且为整数格式，右对齐占10位宽度，格式说明符为`:>10,.0f`。利润率`profit_ratio`需要格式化为百分比并保留两位小数，格式说明符为`:.2%`。",
    "example": "print(f\"{1000000:,.2f}元， {0.15:.0%}\")  # 输出：1,000,000.00元， 15%"
  },
  {
    "id": 15,
    "type": "fill",
    "title": "终极挑战：复杂报表",
    "content": "这段代码根据多种格式要求生成报表。请填入缺失的格式说明符片段，使输出完全匹配。",
    "input": null,
    "output": ["ID: #0007 | Value: 1,234.57 | Status: ON  |", "Progress: [=====     ] 50.0%"],
    "code_segments": {
      "segments": [
        {
          "type": "code_block",
          "lines": [
            {"type": "code_line", "value": "id_num = 7"},
            {"type": "code_line", "value": "value = 1234.567"},
            {"type": "code_line", "value": "status = \"ON\""},
            {"type": "code_line", "value": "progress = 0.5"},
            {"type": "code_line", "value": "bar = \"=\" * int(progress * 10) + \" \" * (10 - int(progress * 10))"},
            {"type": "code_line", "value": "print(f\"ID: #{id_num:____} | Value: {value:____} | Status: {status:____} |\")"},
            {"type": "code_line", "value": "print(f\"Progress: [{bar}] {progress:____}\")"}
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    "options": ["04d", ">3", "<4", ":>8,.2f", ":^4", ":.1%", ":6.2f", ":,.1f", ":<4"],
    "answer": [0, 3, 8, 5],
    "explanation": "ID需要4位数字，不足补零，用`04d`。Value需要千分位分隔、总宽8、右对齐、保留两位小数，用`>8,.2f`。Status左对齐占4位宽度，用`<4`。Progress以百分比显示并保留一位小数，用`:.1%`。",
    "example": "n=5; v=1234.5; s=\"Y\"; print(f\"#{n:03d} | {v:7,.1f} | {s:<2} |\")  # 输出：#005 | 1,234.5 | Y  |"
  }
]
